chart_title: R2 ladder training-fit and component validation detail
calculation_basis: Training-fit R2 computed as 1 - SSE/SST on fitted training rows only.
notes: This row is never computed from validation forecast rows.
component_model: Light RUC base OLS fitted training rows
interpretation: Training-fit R2 is computed from fitted rows inside the rolling training windows. It is not an out-of-sample forecast metric.
